news.title: Photos: College of Nursing seniors make waves to celebrate graduation
news.summary_en: Nearly 100 College of Nursing seniors took part in the decades-old tradition on May 4.

news.title: Professor named to American Academy of Arts and Sciences
news.summary_en: Luis Alberto Urrea is the eighth UIC faculty member to join the prestigious honorary society.

news.title: UIC historian Jane Rhodes elected to the American Antiquarian Society
news.summary_en: Rhodes was recognized for her outstanding contributions to academic and public life.

news.title: Neuropsychiatric Institute facade restoration project nears completion
news.summary_en: Restoration work at the historic site is expected to be completed in July.
